parts.description: Background daemon service with system tray, provider-aware JSON-RPC API, Jellyfin/Subsonic/OpenSubsonic adapters, SQLite storage
Tauri 2 desktop application with TypeScript/Vite frontend, Shoelace web components, and provider-neutral browse/sync UI

integration_points.details: UI sends JSON-RPC requests to daemon for server connection, provider-neutral browse, device management, sync, manifests, scrobbling, and transcoding
Image proxy — daemon fetches active-provider cover art with auth
Daemon communicates with Jellyfin, Subsonic, Navidrome, or OpenSubsonic servers for library data, downloads, cover art, scrobbling, and change detection
